ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. Four panel construction. Slim line, knee length. Shirt in white tubular silk georgette. Kimono style sleeves narrowing at slit cuff. Mannish silk satin collar in bombé cut. Hip- hugging basque for a blousy effect. Bow in brown silk taffeta. Long and wide (5 cm) with 1 cm parallel topstiching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Here’s another outfit capturing to perfection Gianfranco Ferré’s passion for mingling masculine and feminine fashion with thoughtful elegance. The extralong jacket references the 19th century men’s tailcoat, where the new bombé styling in no way took away from the original design of this classic article of bourgeois clothing.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: T-shirt in glossy brown crocodile leather. Elbow-length kimono sleeves. Crew neck with opening in back. Pants in brown/white chalkstripe wool. High waist with two tucks. Straight leg, ankle length. Belt in glossy brown crocodile leather with rectangular buckle. Bow in brown/white polkadot chiffon. Lavish proportions with two-button closure. Detachable.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: What makes this outfit elegantly unique and recherché is the synergistic relationship between feminine chic and mannish style, between fanciful dots and severe stripes.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Chalkstripe wool (Schontess), print silk chiffon (Clerici Tessuto, Como), genuine crocodile leather with high gloss finish
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Canotta di linea aderente, priva di maniche e lunga al secondo fianco, con chiusura anteriore a girocollo e profonda scollatura a V sul retro. Il completo è completamente ricoperto da paillettes sino all’alta bordura inferiore in pelliccia, che nasconde, posteriormente, una piccola chiusura a zip.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress bustier style. Form fit, knee length. With silk tape on brown organza silk lining zigzagging across the whole dress. Silk taffeta ribbon on bodice, knotting into a bow complete with big velvet pansy
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: This dress is clearly an expression of Gianfranco Ferré’s intrinsic passion for hyperbole, his pursuit of elements of exaggeration and excess (in reality, always calculated and calibrated to perfection)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como), 1 cm wide silk tape, silk taffeta (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Extensive application of silk tape; parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress with brown/black macro houndstooth check silk skirt. Slim line, knee length, wrap style closure in back with diagonally overlapping edges. Form-fitting bustier bodice in black lurex lace with truncated cone element (richly embroidered with flowers & spirals) opening on one side to create a corolla effect. Long brown velvet ribbon with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Some true hallmarks of the Ferré style confirm the authenticity of this creation: namely, the luxurious materials and the gorgeous details, all at once decorative and structural.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk jacquard (Schoentess, Milano; art. 122, des. 5181, var.1), cotton/lurex lace, silk velvet
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress redingote style in black cutwork silk crêpe with black silk satin lining. Slim bodice with little lapel collar, padded shoulders, long narrow sleeves. Front metal-clasp closure with small overlay. Skirt with lovely A-line flare. Under the collar are big black organza & velvet leaf appliqués, with matching topstitched silk satin ribbon to knot below. Black organza lining for top part of the dress. Then for added fullness, the flaring skirt has a big nylon flounce on the inside.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Here’s a 20th century take (very much in feminine version) on the 18th century young man’s redingote. Distinguishing features include the silk crêpe fabric complete with meticulous cutwork: the classic eyelet effect is the amazing result of hand craftsmanship performed on the finished garment.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk crepe, silk satin, silk organza, cotton velvet, nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Silk fabric all in cutwork motif

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Coat-dress in black silk marocain. Six-part construction, amphora line, ankle length. Kimono style sleeves narrowing toward slit lower edge (to turn up in a cuff). Bombé-cut lapels & mid bottom opening. Black crepe de chine lining. Two black silk taffeta ribbons (20 cm wide) with 1 cm parallel topstitching at sides of upper back knot into a bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: While an exquisite expression of severity elegance, this dress holds elements of surprise: the sumptuous decor at right wrist level and the big bow at back waist (totally invisible from the front).
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk marocain (Taroni, Como; art. 17028), silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. black
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6633.description: Dress bustier/ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, lilac, silver). Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. Black velvet ribbon with decorative topstitching knotted into a bow at front waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6633.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the large skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big velvet bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6633.materials: Satin smooth silk faille (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 3, var. 4), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk gazar (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6633.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress in brown silk taffeta with decorative topstitching. Slim strapless bodice in double layer of silk faille (30 cm wide ribbon) crisscrossing neatly in front and then knotting obi style in back. Under the bustline a circular panel of topstitched silk taffeta flares beautifully outward from large fluid pleats.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: This dress captures an at once perfect and singular balance of shapes, volumes, proportions: an amazing sum of parts in sublime opposition to one another.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 3057, var. 824), silk faille (Clerici Tessuto; Como), nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: 1 cm. parallel topstitching all along the circular panel

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Abito – bustier composto da più elementi che si sovrappongono: il bustino è formato da due tronchi di cono che si aprono a corolla sul davanti; la parte inferiore è costituita da una gonna a ¾ di ruota su cui è cucito un elemento a mezza ruota a formare pieghe. La crinolina di nylon inserita nei profili esterni sostiene le ampiezze e favorisce un effetto plastico e tridimensionale.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Tutto si arrotonda, tutto si dilata. Il capo ondeggia nella sua ruota quasi conica con un movimento fermato nel tempo, in perfetto equilibrio di volumi e proporzioni.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Taffeta di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como art. 0802 - col. nero) trapunto e matelassé; duchesse di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como); crinolina di nylon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: impunture parallele a mm10 seguono l’andamento delle forme geometriche del capo

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, fuchsia, silver). Slim strapless bodice with low-cut V neckline in back. Voluminous skirt thanks to large fluid pleats. Brown silk floral & spiral embroidery on wide black band at hip level. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt (underneath) in brown silk velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Mid-thigh length. Knotted black silk faille ribbon on waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The outstanding feature here is the artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions, so revealing once again the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how in back the large skirt rests on the short slim one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk faille in wide bands of color (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 2, var. 2), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como; col. brown)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Complex brown silk relief embroidery; parallel topstiching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress bustier/ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, lilac, silver). Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. Black velvet ribbon with decorative topstitching knotted into a bow at front waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the large skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big velvet bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Satin smooth silk faille (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 3, var. 4), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk gazar (Clerici Tessuto, Como)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress with a bustier made of white cotton honeycomb piqué and a skirt in purple silk faille with black and gold stripes, with a satin weave that does not appear on the reverse side.The panels are assembled with large loose pleats in the skirt and are hollowed out from the waist up. Black silk organza lining. A topstitched satin ribbon at 0.5 cm is attached to the dress, tied in a bow at the front, over which the skirt drapes to form a drape. Nylon crinoline structure supports the shape and weight of the skirt. Brown velvet underskirt; fitted; mid-thigh length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the long full skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big satiny silk bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: White piqué; purple silk faille with black and gold stripes (Clerici Tessuto, Como; design 3 var.4); brown silk velvet (Stucchi, Como); black silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como); nylon crinoline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress in black wool crepe with eight-part construction. Long lavishly flaring skirt with asymmetric front hem. Underneath, black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces. Long bodice with eight-part construction. Round neck, narrow wrist-length sleeves.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: A dark lady of past times. Here the chaste severity of the Victorian Age is offset by quiet elements of wicked femininity, as in the gold flounces with gilt sequins peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Wool crepe (Schontess, Milano), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; sequining
